name: Prosody Lint
description: Flags lyric lines exceeding 12 syllables and detects common prosody issues on song file save

then.prompt: Run a prosody lint on this saved song file. Check all LYRIC lines (not tags, not direction blocks, not Production Notes) for: 1) Lines exceeding 12 syllables — flag with ⚠️ PROSODY, 2) Dense phrases with 3+ multi-syllable words crammed together, 3) Lines ending on weak function words (the, a, of, to, in, for, it, is, was), 4) Enjambment where sentences span lines without em-dash. Skip parenthetical layers, spoken sections, and direction blocks. Summarize total issues found.
